title: Captive Portal Addon Options
description: Schema for /data/options.json written by the HA Supervisor based on addon config.json schema. Defines the user-configurable options exposed in the HA addon configuration panel.

log_level.title: Log Level
log_level.description: Application log verbosity. Maps to Python logging levels.

session_idle_timeout.title: Session Idle Timeout (minutes)
session_idle_timeout.description: Number of minutes of inactivity before an admin session expires. Must be at least 1.

session_max_duration.title: Session Max Duration (hours)
session_max_duration.description: Maximum number of hours an admin session can remain active regardless of activity. Must be at least 1.
